mapper.insert: insert into reports (report_id, target_type, target_id, member_id, reason_code, reason_detail) values ( reports_seq.nextval, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{memberId}, #{reasonCode}, #{reasonDetail} )
mapper.update: update reports set reason_code = #{reasonCode}, reason_detail = #{reasonDetail}, updated_at = sysdate where report_id = #{reportId} and member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N' and status = 'PENDING'
update reports set delete_yn = 'Y' where report_id = #{reportId} and member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N' and status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: select report_id, target_type, target_id, member_id, reason_code, reason_detail, status, created_at from reports where member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N' order by report_id desc offset #{start} rows fetch next #{end} rows only
select count(*) from reports where member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N'

select report_id, target_type, target_id, member_id, reason_code, reason_detail, status, created_at, updated_at from reports where report_id = #{reportId} and member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N'
select count(*) from reports where member_id = #{memberId} and target_type = #{targetType} and target_id = #{targetId} and delete_yn = 'N'
select count(*) from reports where member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N' and created_at >= trunc(sysdate) and created_at < trunc(sysdate) +1
